description: JSX prop typo (added 2026-06-13, fixture-coverage hardening). 'classNam' is a misspelling of the DOM prop 'className'. TS reports it as TS2322 but offers its `spelling` did-you-mean code-fix; admitting TS2322 to SAFE_FIXABLE_CODES (gated by SAFE_FIX_NAMES, which only applies the trusted spelling/import names) lets Layer 1 rename it deterministically. Pins the TS2322 widening: real type mismatches offer no code-fix so the fixer abstains on them — see synthetic-* mismatch coverage and the probe in plans/progress.md.
